actions: JBIMS entitlement set from WooCommerce purchase.

diagnosis.pack_note: add_course loops every purchased course_id with category_id 100000 and sub_cat (33599 CET / 33605 NMAT). Stale product meta (e.g. 38053) is remapped from the order line title to 90069–90073 when you run sync.

tcy_repair.pack_note: MBA courses use category_id 100000 + sub_cat 33599/33605; CUET 90315 uses 902346 + 38072. Invalid Product_ids (e.g. 38053) are skipped.
